MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Equity Residential Management, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Ginger L. Stelo; Pahl & McCay, APLC; 408-286-5100; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Equity Residential Management LLC.
Daniel Lee; 415-203-5089; defendant in pro per, appearing in person on their own behalf.

Hearing held. Plaintiff's counsel states that defendant's address of record has been vacated, and that the address listed on the proof of service filed on March 28, 2022 is defendant's residence address which she has confirmed with the defendant. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP Section 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Plaintiff Equity Residential Management, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
